login.title: Sign in to your AI workspace
login.subtitle: Use a secure magic link or an OAuth provider to continue to downloads, donations, certificates, and your dashboard.
login.privacyNote: Your account keeps donation records, certificates, and supporter privacy tied to you.
login.success: Check your email for a secure sign-in link.
login.submitError: Could not send the link. Check the address and try again.
login.oauthError: Could not start sign in. Try another provider or use email.
login.callbackError: The sign-in link could not be verified. Please try again.

home.title: GitBook AI
home.subtitle: Download the AI-powered coding book companion for structured programming knowledge, release notes, and developer learning workflows.
home.supportPrompt: Downloads stay free. Donations keep the AI knowledge engine improving.
home.featureOneText: Navigate code concepts, notes, and book-like knowledge with a focused software interface.
home.featureTwoText: Fast downloads, predictable releases, and a dashboard for certificates and supporter history.
home.featureThreeText: English-first with Traditional Chinese, Japanese, and Korean routes for international users.

donate.title: Support GitBook AI development
donate.subtitle: Choose a one-time support amount to fund releases, AI knowledge updates, and certificate infrastructure.
donate.payPalUnavailable: PayPal is not enabled yet because PayPal donation records and certificates are still being integrated.

sponsors.title: Supporters powering GitBook AI
sponsors.subtitle: A public thank-you for supporters who chose to be listed after a paid donation.
sponsors.paidSummary: {count, plural, one {# paid donation} other {# paid donations}} · {total}
sponsors.unavailable: The sponsor wall is temporarily unavailable.

privacy.title: Public supporter privacy
privacy.description: Choose whether your support appears on the sponsor wall.
privacy.publicLabel: List me on the sponsor wall
privacy.publicHelp: Only your public display name and paid donation summary will appear.
privacy.displayNameHelp: Leave blank to show the localized Supporter fallback. Your email is never shown.
privacy.error: Could not save privacy settings. Please try again.

overview.title: Admin
overview.donationsDescription: Review payment provider records, statuses, and transaction IDs.
overview.certificatesDescription: Review issued certificate numbers, types, statuses, and issue dates.
overview.auditLogsDescription: Review admin corrections, revocations, and reasons.

donations.title: Admin donations
donations.manualEntryDescription: Create one paid manual record for an existing user by email or user ID.

certificate.title: Certificate of Support
certificate.description: This certificate is presented with gratitude for meaningful support of independent software development.

download.title: Download certificate
download.note: Current exports are SVG only. Open the file in your browser to print or save as PDF; native PNG/PDF export is planned for a later release.
